extortion.description: Vossko GmbH & Co. KG is a German company specializing in the production of frozen and chilled convenience food products, primarily focusing on poultry, beef, and pork, as well as vegetarian and vegan options. Founded in 1982 by Bernhard and Maria Vosskötter, the company is headquartered in Ostbevern, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, and operates a second facility in Lages, Santa Catarina, Brazil.SITE: www.vossko.de Address : Vossko-Allee 1 48346 Ostbevern DeutschlandALL DATA SIZE: ≈800gb 1. Financial data 2. Personal employees data 3. Projects 4. Personal documents & etc…
